parameters.query: SELECT key, value FROM system_vars WHERE key IN ('owner_chat_id', 'revenue_notification_last_sent_at', 'revenue_notification_last_hash')

WITH rec_status AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'draft') AS draft_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'approved') AS approved_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'exported') AS exported_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'manually_applied') AS manually_applied_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'apply_failed') AS apply_failed_count
  FROM pricing_recommendations
),
gap_summary AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS total_gaps,
    COALESCE(SUM(estimated_loss), 0) AS total_estimated_loss
  FROM gap_windows WHERE status = 'open'
),
comp_stats AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT cpo.id) FILTER (
      WHERE cs.status = 'active' AND cpo.observed_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days'
    ) AS stale_obs,
    COUNT(DISTINCT cpo.id) FILTER (
      WHERE cs.status = 'active' AND cpo.observed_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '14 days'
    ) AS fresh_obs,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY cpo.price_per_night)
      FILTER (WHERE cs.status = 'active' AND cs.similarity_score >= 80) AS market_median
  FROM competitor_sources cs
  LEFT JOIN competitor_price_observations cpo ON cpo.competitor_source_id = cs.id
),
top_gap AS (
  SELECT apartment_id, gap_start, gap_end, nights,
         COALESCE(estimated_loss, 0) AS estimated_loss
  FROM gap_windows WHERE status = 'open'
  ORDER BY estimated_loss DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  rs.draft_count, rs.approved_count, rs.exported_count,
  rs.manually_applied_count, rs.apply_failed_count,
  gs.total_gaps, gs.total_estimated_loss,
  cs.stale_obs, cs.fresh_obs, cs.market_median,
  tg.apartment_id AS top_gap_apt, tg.gap_start AS top_gap_start,
  tg.gap_end AS top_gap_end, tg.nights AS top_gap_nights,
  tg.estimated_loss AS top_gap_loss
FROM rec_status rs, gap_summary gs, comp_stats cs
LEFT JOIN top_gap tg ON TRUE

INSERT INTO system_vars (key, value, description, updated_at)
VALUES
  ('revenue_notification_last_sent_at', '{{ $now.toISO() }}', 'Last revenue notification sent at', NOW()),
  ('revenue_notification_last_hash', '{{ $json.message_hash }}', 'Hash of last revenue notification content', NOW())
ON CONFLICT (key) DO UPDATE SET
  value = EXCLUDED.value,
  updated_at = NOW()
